title: aeschynomene katangensis subsp. katangensis
intro: Aeschynomene katangensis subsp. katangensis, also known as Katanga bean or Katanga cowpea, is a plant species within the pea family Fabaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have several health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments. However, more research is needed to fully understand the efficacy and potential interactions of Aeschynomene katangensis subsp. katangensis in traditional medicine.
